title: Introduction to JavaScript
description: Learn JavaScript from the ground up. This course covers variables, functions, objects, and modern ES6+ features.

title: React Fundamentals
description: Build modern web applications with React. Covers hooks, state management, and component architecture.

title: Python for Data Analysis
description: Master Python libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib for data analysis and visualization.

title: Machine Learning Basics
description: An introduction to machine learning concepts, algorithms, and practical implementation with scikit-learn.
